# Summary

Describe the change and user-visible impact.

## Change type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Release or metadata

## Linked Issue

Link an issue when applicable.

## Docs impact

- [ ] Public docs in `docs/site` updated or not needed
- [ ] Release-facing docs updated or not needed
- [ ] Internal docs updated or not needed

## Verification

List exact commands and results.

```text

```

## Changelog

- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated or not needed

## AI-Assisted Contribution

- [ ] Any AI-assisted or generated output was reviewed line by line by the human author
- [ ] The human author understands, verifies, owns, and stands behind this change
